name: Counter-Strike 2
searchHints: "Counter-Strike 2" OR "CS2" current active Premier Season number start end date
"CS2" Premier season start end date latest announcement

seasons.description: The current Premier season brought a new season medal chase, Train replacing Vertigo in the Active Duty map pool, and a fresh CS Rating recalibration for competitive play.
Premier Season Three opened with Overpass returning to Active Duty, Anubis rotating out, and a new medal grind for players competing in Premier matchmaking.
Premier Season Two reset CS Ratings and party eligibility, resumed Premier matchmaking, and started the Season Two medal progression for players in good standing.
